name: TruLens
tagline: Trace and evaluate LLM apps and agents with feedback functions on OpenTelemetry
seoTitle: TruLens: Evaluate & Trace LLM Apps and Agents
metaDescription: TruLens is an open-source Python library that traces and evaluates LLM apps and agents with feedback functions, built on OpenTelemetry spans.
overview: TruLens is an open-source Python library for evaluating and tracking LLM applications and agents. Instead of manually checking outputs by hand, you attach feedback functions that score each run, so you can measure how a prompt, model, or retriever change affects quality and iterate from there.

Its instrumentation is built on OpenTelemetry, so every function call, LLM generation, retrieval, and tool invocation is captured as a structured span. Those traces are interoperable with existing observability backends like Jaeger, Grafana Tempo, Datadog, or any OTLP-compatible system.

It fits the evaluation and testing category as an eval framework for teams building RAG pipelines and agentic systems. It ships agent-specific evaluators, batch and inline evaluation modes, MCP tracing, and connectors for providers such as OpenAI, LiteLLM, Google, Bedrock, Snowflake Cortex, and HuggingFace.
features: OpenTelemetry-based tracing: each retrieval, generation, and tool call is captured as a structured OTEL span you can export to OTLP backends
Feedback functions to systematically score app runs instead of manually vibe-checking outputs
Seven agent evaluators including LogicalConsistency, PlanAdherence, ToolSelection, and ToolCalling
Inline, on existing data, or offline batch evaluation via the Run API
MCP span type to instrument Model Context Protocol tool calls (name, arguments, output, latency)
Provider packages for OpenAI/Azure, LiteLLM, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Snowflake Cortex, HuggingFace, and LangChain

gettingStarted.intro: Install the core package from PyPI, add a provider for feedback evaluation, then instrument your app with OpenTelemetry spans.

steps.heading: Add a provider and framework integration
steps.body: Install a provider for feedback evaluation and, if needed, an app framework integration.
steps.code:
pip install trulens trulens-providers-openai   # OpenAI / Azure OpenAI
pip install trulens trulens-apps-langchain     # LangChain / LangGraph

steps.heading: Instrument a retrieval span
steps.body: Decorate your app methods with the OpenTelemetry instrument decorator so each call is captured as a typed span.

steps.heading: Target attributes with the Selector API
steps.body: Define a metric and point it at the span attributes you want to evaluate.

useCases: Measure RAG quality with feedback functions for context relevance and groundedness while iterating on prompts, models, and retrievers
Debug agent behavior with evaluators for plan adherence, tool selection, and tool calling
Export LLM traces as OpenTelemetry spans to Jaeger, Grafana Tempo, Datadog, or another OTLP backend
Run offline batch evaluations over a pre-collected dataset using the Run API
